name: Eurodollar Futures,Dec-2029
summary: Eurodollar Futures, Dec-2029 represents a standardized, exchange-traded contract for future delivery of Eurodollars, which are U.S. dollars held in banks outside the United States, with settlement occurring in December 2029. These futures contracts are traded on the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME) and used for hedging or speculating on short-term U.S. dollar interest rates. The CME Group is located in Chicago, Illinois.
